name: Ping Pong
current_goal: Maintain the single-node intranet speed-test service with browser-scoped Recent Results, fixed homepage Quick 20s and Full 30s modes, proportional startup trimming, Raw CV and Stable CV throughput diagnostics, current-run Raw Data popup/CSV diagnostics, stability-first completion summaries, hotspot data-plan warning, required per-test Wired/Wi-Fi labeling, current connection IP visibility, Web Worker execution, HTML/PNG/Markdown IT diagnostic report export, local-throttled maintenance self-tests, a desktop one-screen dashboard, Admin Console controls, local production health, OctoPulse visibility, and repo-visible reusable documentation.
latest_summary: Implemented link-aware Completion Summary stability judging: Wired and Unknown keep strict worst-grade thresholds, while Wi-Fi uses a usability-aware profile that keeps raw throughput diagnostics intact but avoids labeling usable variable Wi-Fi as unstable.
next_action: Review and commit the Wi-Fi stability summary logic, regression tests, README and whitepaper updates, and refreshed status snapshot; keep unrelated dirty files out of that commit.

last_commands: git diff --check -- src/client/result-summary.ts test/result-summary.test.ts README.md docs/speed-test-statistics-whitepaper.md
Browser Wi-Fi homepage smoke QA at 1089x964, 1280x900, 1710x1021, and 390x844
verification.notes: Wi-Fi stability summary verification passed. Focused result-summary tests, typecheck, whitespace diff check, full Vitest suite (94 tests), and production build passed. The PORT=8200 launchd service was restarted after the final build; port 8200 was listening, /api/health returned ok, and the built homepage HTML loaded. Browser QA confirmed page identity, Quick 20s and Full 30s controls, Wi-Fi selection, Start enabled after link selection, no horizontal overflow, no console warnings/errors, one-screen desktop height at 1089x964, 1280x900, and 1710x1021, and reachable vertical mobile layout at 390x844. Browser screenshots were saved under /tmp/ping-pong-wifi-stability-*.png.

attention: Current Wi-Fi stability summary changes are uncommitted in README.md, docs/speed-test-statistics-whitepaper.md, src/client/result-summary.ts, test/result-summary.test.ts, and .ai/status.json.

Working tree also remains dirty because of unrelated pre-existing .gitignore and AGENTS.md edits, a deleted Ping-Pong project docx, untracked Ping-Pong-Project-Specification.html, and docs/analysis-data-debugging.md.
Branch main is ahead of origin/main by 1 commit (ef7ed47).
The running service uses .env PORT=8200, not the README default 8080.
Local throttled runs are maintenance checks only; a non-local intranet device test is still required to evaluate real network performance.
